projectDescription: A high-performance, open-source slicer for MSLA resin 3D printers.
keyFeatures: Ultra-fast slicing performance (20-120x faster than competitors)
Multiple output formats (Chitu CTB, Elegoo GOO, NanoDLP, SVG)
Interactive 3D viewport with real-time model manipulation
Layer-by-layer slice preview with zoom and pan
Automatic support generation and overhang detection
Remote printing via MQTT with real-time status monitoring
CLI tool for batch processing and automation
Advanced post-processing (anti-aliasing, island detection, elephant foot compensation)
publicApiSurface: slicer - CLI tool with mesh loading and slicing
SliceConfig - Platform resolution, size, layer height, exposure settings
ExposureConfig - Layer exposure time, lift/retract speeds and distances
Output formats - CTB (Chitu), GOO (Elegoo), NanoDLP, SVG (Vector)
Remote printing - HTTP API for printer status monitoring
Post-processing - Anti-aliasing, island detection, elephant foot fixer
Support generation - Overhang detection and support routing
